ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped
ham.body:
Hello Valued Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! We’re excited to let you know that your order has shipped and is on its way to you.

Order Summary:
• Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
• Shipping Address: 42 Maple St., Springfield, IL 62704
• Items:
  – 1 × Kindle Paperwhite – $129.99
  – 2 × Echo Dot (3rd Gen) – $19.99 each
  – 1 × Amazon Basics USB-C Cable – $9.99
• Total (incl. taxes & shipping): $170.96

Estimated Delivery: Thursday, Apr 25, 2026

You can track your shipment at any time by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you have any questions or need to change your delivery address, please contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,

The Amazon.com Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Unclaimed FedEx Delivery – Pay $49 Fee Now
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Our records show that a FedEx package was scheduled for delivery to your address on April 20, 2026, but the recipient was not available to accept the shipment. As a result, the package has been held at the FedEx facility for 48 hours.

To avoid further delay and potential loss of your shipment, you must pay a recovery fee of $49.00 within the next 24 hours. Failure to comply will result in the package being returned to the sender and you will be responsible for all additional shipping and handling costs.

Please complete the payment promptly by clicking the link below:

<URL>

We understand the inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your immediate attention to this matter. If you believe this notice has been sent in error, please contact FedEx Customer Service immediately at 1-800-553-3860.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

FedEx Legal Department
FedEx Customer Support
